input: I have a messy folder with 200+ invoices from the past 3 years. Can you help me organize them into a proper filing system with consistent naming?
I need to extract the vendor name, date, and total amount from this PDF invoice and rename the file properly.
Help me set up a filing system for my business invoices that my accountant can easily navigate during tax season.
I need to prepare all my invoices for my CPA. Can you organize them by IRS expense category and generate a CSV summary?
Help me categorize these receipts and invoices into business expense categories like software, travel, office supplies, and contractor payments.
I think I have duplicate invoices in my folder from downloading the same ones multiple times. Can you find and handle the duplicates?
I have invoices from European vendors with VAT charges in euros. Help me process these foreign invoices and convert the amounts for my US tax filing.
Create a standard naming convention for my invoice files that includes the date, vendor, invoice number, and amount.
I need to batch process about 50 receipt images from my phone and extract the expense data from each one.
Export my organized invoices into a format that QuickBooks Online can import directly, with the right column headers and date format.
Set up an automated workflow that watches my Downloads folder for new invoices and automatically files them into the right category.
I need to match my filed invoices against my bank statement to see which ones have been paid and which are still outstanding.
Create the journal entries for these invoices in my general ledger with the proper debits and credits.
Help me file my quarterly estimated tax payments and calculate how much I owe for Q2.
